title: wechat-ai-article cover_text.json
description: Configuration consumed by postprocess_cover.py. Each cover candidate writes its own cover_text.json into ~/wechat-articles/{dir}/ (or candidates/). Coordinates are pixels in the final 2350x1000 canvas (origin = top-left). Chinese main headline is baked into the cover via PIL; the `texts` array still carries English/numeric side-tags (brand tag, version arrow, etc.).

archetype.description: Which archetype composer to run. See cover-template.md. A01 Cinematic Hero, A02 Editorial Split, A03 Duotone Pressure, A04 Data Monolith, A05 Type Sculpture, A06 Magazine Index.

palette.description: Colors used by the composer (not by GenerateImage). Derived from the article's visual-language card Step 4.5 palette_id.

primary.description: Dominant color (background for A04/A05, shadow color for A03 duotone).

accent.description: Headline color / highlight color for duotone. Must contrast with primary.

panel_color.description: Color for the solid panel in A02 / the cream frame in A06. Defaults to accent if omitted.

ink.description: Dark body-text color for A06 magazine-index on cream. Defaults to #111111.

headline_cn.description: The Chinese main headline that gets baked into the cover. Required — this is the single biggest quality lever of the new pipeline.

text.description: The literal Chinese headline to render, ≤ 14 characters recommended. Examples: 重夺最强 LLM 王座 / 一次提价两成的底气 / Apple 自研 AI 芯片首亮相.

font.description: Font filename, e.g. msyhbd.ttc (Windows), PingFang.ttc (macOS), SourceHanSansSC-Bold.otf. Falls back automatically through msyhbd -> Source Han Sans -> Noto Sans CJK -> PingFang -> SimHei.

max_size.description: Upper bound for auto-sizing. 120-160 works for 1-line, 100-140 for 2-line. A05 Type Sculpture prefers 200-240 (sculptural).

min_size.description: Lower bound. Do not go below 56 or the headline becomes unreadable at 300px thumbnail.

line_height.description: Line height multiplier. 1.0 for A05 (sculptural dense), 1.15-1.25 for readable body.

color.description: Headline color. Must pass WCAG AA contrast against the background region.

shadow.description: Optional drop shadow color (with alpha, e.g. #00000066). Used by A01 (on photograph) and A03 (on duotone).

rect.description: Bounding rect the headline must fit inside. Each archetype has a default if omitted.

weight.description: Prefer bold for all headlines. Regular only for A06 if you want editorial restraint.

tracking.description: Extra letter-spacing as em fraction. Chinese usually 0 (native kerning is fine). 0.02-0.04 opens a tiny bit for wider feel.

veil.description: Optional gradient veil composited on top of the hero for headline legibility. Primarily used by A01 and A03.

direction.description: Where the opaque end of the gradient lives.

from.description: Starting color (with alpha). Usually fully transparent: #00000000.

to.description: Ending color (with alpha). Use #000000cc-ee for strong legibility, #00000066-88 for subtle.

start_ratio.description: Fraction of the canvas on the 'from' side that stays fully transparent before the ramp begins. 0.4 means the top 40% is untouched.

duotone.description: Used only by A03. Two hex colors forming a luminance ramp.

shadow.description: Dark end of the duotone ramp.

highlight.description: Light end of the duotone ramp.

fit.description: Fallback fit mode when no archetype is set (legacy path). With an archetype, this is only used as a safety net if the composer returned a non-target size.

border_px.description: Hairline border. 0 disables. Recommended 1 for A06 Magazine Index.

noise.description: Film grain intensity. Typical 0.02-0.05 for A01/A03/A06. Avoid for A02/A04.

vignette.description: Edge darkening. Typical 0.10-0.25 for A03/A05. Avoid for A02/A06.

seed.description: Optional RNG seed for reproducible noise.

texts.description: English/numeric side-tags, drawn after the CN headline. Keep to 0-3 entries. Typical roles: brand tag (top-right), numeric mark (bottom-right), version arrow.

font.description: Falls back through Inter -> Helvetica -> Arial -> Segoe UI -> Georgia -> DejaVuSans.

anchor.description: Pillow text anchor: lt / mt / rt / lm / mm / rm / lb / mb / rb.

headline_cn.text: 重夺最强 LLM 王座
重夺最强 LLM 王座
